Bi-Weekly Report
• VLCC Market Faces Downward Pressure Amid Sluggish Activity and OPEC+ Production Cuts - The VLCC market is once
again under renewed pressure as we enter the month of June. Although by Mid-May signs of firmness seemed evident
driven by uncertainties about a potentially robust market heading into early summer, these expectations were dampened
as concerns about an oversupply of tonnage proved to be well-founded and, as a result, the spot VLCC market weakened
at the end of last week. On the key AG-China route, spot VLCC rates have now recorded an almost

Bi-Weekly Report
• VLCC Market Faces Downward Pressure Amid Sluggish Activity and OPEC+ Production Cuts - The VLCC market is once
